dedup_decision.rationale: no prior cluster shared both target and mechanism

command_argv:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64
from pathlib import Path
Path('/app/task_assets/instruction.md').write_bytes(base64.b64decode(''))
PY
exec uv run hud serve env:env --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8765
grader_command_argv: python3 -m pytest task_assets/test_outputs.py -rA -q > .grade.log 2>&1; rc=$?; cat .grade.log; exit $rc
